elements.original_description: A smiling woman holding multiple shopping bags with colorful logos, standing in front of a clothing store with a bright red sale sign. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a smiling woman holding multiple shopping bags with colorful logos, standing in front of a clothing store with a bright red sale sign. Cinematic lighting, bokeh background, sharp focus on the woman and her bags, cheerful American street atmosphere. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: The same woman sitting on a couch surrounded by her purchases, looking relaxed and happy with a cup of coffee in hand. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of the same woman sitting on a cozy couch surrounded by her purchases, looking relaxed and happy with a cup of coffee in hand. Warm, soft domestic lighting, comfortable home interior, high resolution, serene and content mood. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
